name: crew-bus
description: Talk to your local AI agent crew from Claude. Coordinate tasks, send messages, search memories, and manage your team — all through natural conversation.
long_description: Crew Bus connects Claude to your local AI agent team running on your Mac. Your crew includes Crew Boss (task coordinator), Guardian (security gatekeeper), and Vault (personal memory). Use Claude to send messages, check what your agents have been working on, search their memories, review audit logs, and post to the team mailbox. Everything runs locally — your data never leaves your Mac.

tools.name: crewbus_list_agents
tools.description: List all crew members with their status, role, and type

tools.name: crewbus_send_message
tools.description: Send a message to an agent and get their reply

tools.name: crewbus_get_agent_chat
tools.description: Get recent chat history with an agent

tools.name: crewbus_get_crew_stats
tools.description: Get dashboard overview with agent counts and metrics

tools.name: crewbus_list_teams
tools.description: List all teams with manager and member info

tools.name: crewbus_get_team_detail
tools.description: Get detailed info about a specific team

tools.name: crewbus_get_message_feed
tools.description: View recent inter-agent messages and bus events

tools.name: crewbus_search_agent_memory
tools.description: Search an agent's experiences and learned facts

tools.name: crewbus_get_agent_learnings
tools.description: See what an agent has learned — mistakes and successes

tools.name: crewbus_get_audit_log
tools.description: View recent crew actions and configuration changes

tools.name: crewbus_post_to_team_mailbox
tools.description: Post a message to the team mailbox with priority level
